name: sap-abap-mcp
description: Develop, test, analyze, and operate SAP ABAP systems through local ADT connections.

interface.shortDescription: Local SAP ABAP development through ADT
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to locally configured SAP ABAP systems for source editing, semantic services, activation, tests, transports, abapGit, RAP, analysis, and guarded refactoring.
defaultPrompt: Inspect an ABAP object and explain its dependencies.
Run ABAP Unit for this object and summarize failures.
Plan a guarded ABAP source change before applying it.
